national_policies.name: Digital Services Act (州级版本)

national_policies.name: Corporate Transparency Act

national_policies.name: Algorithmic Accountability Act
national_policies.impact: 企业需评估AI系统偏倚/安全→AI合规

national_policies.name: American Privacy Rights Act
national_policies.impact: 联邦隐私法→统一取代各州碎片化→合规简化但门槛提高

national_policies.name: Kids Online Safety Act (KOSA)
national_policies.impact: 16岁以下默认最高隐私设置→青少年产品需重新设计

national_policies.name: Biosecure Act
national_policies.impact: 限制与特定中国生物科技公司合作→生物科技脱钩

national_policies.name: DATA Act (防TikTok法案)

national_policies.name: Jumpstart Our Business Startups (JOBS 2.0)

national_policies.name: FCC Net Neutrality恢复

national_policies.name: Green New Deal (州级)

national_policies.name: Right to Repair扩张

national_policies.name: Digital Asset Anti-Money Laundering Act

national_policies.name: Farm Bill新版本
national_policies.impact: 农业补贴+碳信用+生物燃料→农业科技/碳交易受益
